variants.title: HiFi Filter SAM 7107 Filtering Mass
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAM 7107 Filtering Mass. Easy to install and replace, the SAM 7107 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: FILTERING MASS, Dimension 1 (D1): 174.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 163.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 58.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 97.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 64.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 63.0 mm
